---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What would you like to add?

Describe the feature in plain language.

## Why is it useful?

What workflow would this improve?

## Suggested behavior

If you already have an idea for the UI or command flow, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

Are there workarounds or simpler versions that would also help?

## Notes

Please avoid sharing private writing content. A short synthetic example is enough.
